name: 00002 - Futa Labs Remnant
description:
“You’re… Making a mistake..”

Prydwen’s glacier team has recovered a massive structure that seems to have belonged to the long abandoned Futa Labs facilities. Inside the structure, nothing of interest was discovered, save for one woman found sleeping on the ground, cradling the skeleton of what looked to be a Futa Labs researcher. The team was able to successfully restrain the woman before she fully awakened, and immediately shipped her to Warden Labs.

Upon arrival to the Labs, the woman remained confused and docile, until her eyes fell on Alice Warden. A violent attack was launched at the founder, resulting in a heavily injured Alice, despite her modified suit designed for such scenarios.

Alice has not been seen by anyone for the past week, currently in the hands of the OA and recovering. A few messages have been transmitted however.

“That beast is known as ‘00002’. Real name Jellana Adams.”

“Was right next to her when they began the tests. She used to scream so much.. Could never get it out of my head.”

“She was the second subject of Futa Labs. Died only months after her injection.. I don’t know how and why she is alive.”

“Her reaction to me is understandable… I was not good to her in the moments we were together in that damned facility. After all, my designated number was 00003.”

“Do be careful.. The DNA she was given is extremely volatile. Changed her voice. the big shots back then used to call it the ‘Alpha Order’ the way her presence can alter someone’s mind, ever slowly”

00002 is currently restrained, and in a maximum security cell, newly erected to withstand her alarming physical abilities.

DUE TO THE EXTREME PROPERTIES OF THE 00002, 00002 ASSIGNMENTS MAY ONLY BE OBTAINED VIA THE EXTRA INCOME KIOSK. YOU WILL NOT RECEIVE PROTECTIVE RESOURCES WHEN WORKING ON SPECIAL PRISONERS. ENTER CELLS AT YOUR OWN RISK
creator: GrailofHell
